song_name: Sabrina Carpenter - Feather - Taylor Swift - Getaway Car
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Getaway Car]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
It was the best of times, the worst of crimes[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
I struck a match and blew your mind[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
But I didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
And you didn't see it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
The ties were black, the lies were white[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]
In shades of gray in candlelight[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
I wanted to leave him[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I needed a reason[/tab]


[Feather]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I  slam the door, I hit ignore[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
I    say, "no, no, no, no, no more"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I  got you blocked after this, an afterthought[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I    finally cut you off[/tab]


[Getaway Car]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
You were drivin' the getaway car[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
We were flyin', but we never get far[/tab]

Don't pretend it's such a mystery
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]*
Think about the place where you first met me[/tab]


[Feather]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                                    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I feel so much lighter like a feather with you off my mind, ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Floatin' through the memories, like whatever[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
You're a waste of time, ah[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
Your signals are mixed, you act like a b****[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
You fit every stereotype, "send a pic"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                                    [ch]G[/ch]
I feel so much lighter like a feather with you out my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
   With you out my life[/tab]


[Getaway Car]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
 We were jet-set, Bonnie and Clyde (oh-oh)[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]A[/ch]
Until I switched to the other side[/tab]

To the other si-i-i-i-ide
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
 It's no surprise I turned you in (oh-oh)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause us traitors never win[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
 I'm in a getaway car[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
 I left you in a motel bar[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
Put the money in a bag and I stole the keys[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
That was the last time you ever saw me[/tab]
